contents.Description: Case No. SCA/563/2023 was filed before the High Court of Gujarat under the category of Civil Cases. This matter pertains to Cases Filed Against This Corporate, where FOXBASE TECHNOLOGIES PRIVATE LIMITED has initiated proceedings against INSTANT PROCUREMENT SERVICES PRIVATE LIMITED and Others..

Case No. CS DJ/740/2021 was filed before the District and Sessions Judge, Central, THC under the category of Civil Cases. This matter pertains to Cases Filed Against This Corporate, where M/S TRANSJOVAN CAPITAL ADVISORS LLP has initiated proceedings against INSTANT PROCUREMENT SERVICES PRIVATE LIMITED.

Case No. CS (COMM.) /873/2022 was filed before the District and Sessions Judge,New Delhi, PHC under the category of Others. This matter pertains to Cases Filed Against This Corporate, where KUEHNE NAGEL PVT LTD has initiated proceedings against INSTANT PROCUREMENT SERVICES PRIVATE LIMITED.

adverse_media_data.kpi_value:
Name: INSTANT PROCUREMENT SERVICES PRIVATE LIMITED
Rating: 3.2
Number of Reviews: 9


Reviews:
	1. Name: Satva international | Rating: 1
Our experience with this company has been disappointing due to delayed payments. Despite completing the work and multiple follow-ups, the payment has still not been cleared. Timely payment is very important in business, and we hope the company improves its financial commitment and communication with vendors. -AXCELL INDUSTRIES

	2. Name: Axcell Industries | Rating: 1
Avoid ProcMart! They have failed to provide payment for services rendered months ago. Multiple follow-ups have been ignored. Highly unprofessional and lacks integrity. #ProcMart #PaymentIssue #VendorBeware

	3. Name: Nikesh Axcell Industries | Rating: 1
Payment terms are not proper, don't go for verbal confirmations.

	4. Name: CA Lalit Patel | Rating: 5


	5. Name: Srinivasan | Rating: 5
